import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errors: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = ["empty-name"]
  end
  if age < 0
    mut next: List<String> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < errors.len()
      match errors.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        next = ["#{s}"]
        mut j = 1
        while j < errors.len()
          match errors.get(j)
          when Some(t)
            next = ["#{next.get(0)}"]
          when None
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut combined = ""
    mut k = 0
    while k < errors.len()
      match errors.get(k)
      when Some(s)
        if k == 0
          combined = "#{s}"
        else
          combined = "#{combined},#{s}"
        end
      when None
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if string.is_empty(combined)
      errors = ["negative-age"]
    else
      errors = ["#{combined},negative-age"]
    end
  end
  if age > 150
    mut combined2 = ""
    mut k2 = 0
    while k2 < errors.len()
      match errors.get(k2)
      when Some(s)
        if k2 == 0
          combined2 = "#{s}"
        else
          combined2 = "#{combined2},#{s}"
        end
      when None
      end
      k2 = k2 + 1
    end
    if string.is_empty(combined2)
      errors = ["too-old"]
    else
      errors = ["#{combined2},too-old"]
    end
  end
  errors
end

fn report(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  let errs = validate(name, age)
  if errs.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    mut joined = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < errs.len()
      match errs.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        if i == 0
          joined = "#{s}"
        else
          joined = "#{joined},#{s}"
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("errors=#{joined}")
  end
end

report("", -5)
report("Alice", 30)
report("Bob", 200)
